title: Anthropic Walks Back Policy That Could Have ‘Sabotaged’ AI Researchers Using Claude
abstract: Anthropic Walks Back Policy That Could Have ‘Sabotaged’ AI Researchers
abstract_zh: Anthropic的最新更新简直太给力了！之前差点要被“政策”给整蒙圈的那些日子一去不复返啦。现在用 **Anthropic Walks Back Policy That Could Have ‘Sabotaged’ AI Researchers Using Claude**，写周报时再也不怕错过重要细节，调Bug时也能迅速找到解决方案。简直是科研人员的小帮手呀！赶紧试试吧！
